details.description: Ornate historic urban building with a white stucco facade accented by deep blue vertical bands. The three-story elevation is symmetrical, featuring arched ground-floor openings, wrought-iron balcony railings on the first and second floors, and windows with decorative muntin patterns. Rich Baroque/Rococo-style stucco reliefs (cartouches, swags, and a central mascaron) embellish the facade. The triangular pediment has pinecone-like finials and is crowned by a sculpted female figure carrying a basket on her head, likely representing a traditional fishwife (varina). Overhead power/telecom cables cross the view. The scene is a narrow street in Ericeira’s historic center with shop signage visible at street level.

details.description: A white, two-story historic house with rich decorative plasterwork sits along a narrow street in Ericeira. The façade features blue vertical trim, ornate window surrounds with wrought-iron balcony railings on the first floor, and a triangular pediment crowned by a statue. The pediment is flanked by decorative elements and small spheres on the corners. Overhead utility wires cross the façade, and a bright blue sky provides strong, crisp lighting that highlights the intricate details of the façade. A yellow vehicle is visible at street level, indicating an active urban setting in a coastal Portuguese town.

details.description: A white two-story building with ornate decorative plasterwork on the façade, located in Ericeira, Portugal. The ground floor features arched windows/doors with decorative frames and a wrought-iron balcony on the upper floor. Blue vertical accents flank the façade. The triangular pediment at the roofline bears intricate reliefs and is topped by a statue. Several overhead wires cross the façade. The street scene includes shop signs and urban elements visible at street level, with a bright blue sky above.

details.description: A low-angle, vertical shot capturing the ornate upper facade of the Casa de Cultura Jaime Lobo e Silva in Ericeira, Portugal, set against a clear blue sky. The building is painted white with dark blue accents on the corner pilasters and architectural trim. It features a classical triangular pediment adorned with relief carvings of scrolls and a central face, surmounted by a stone statue of a standing female figure holding an object aloft. Below the pediment, a pair of tall French doors opens onto a balcony with a black iron railing. A second, wider balcony spans the lower visible level, from which a sign reading "PEPE VERDE PIZZERIA" hangs. Numerous black electrical wires crisscross the foreground, obstructing the view. To the left, a partial view of a neighboring cream-colored building with a green vertical sign reading "CAMIN" is visible, along with the rear of a yellow DHL delivery van.

details.description: A vertical shot of a historic white building with blue trim in Ericeira, Portugal. The building features ornate Neo-Baroque stucco decorations, including a prominent pediment with a central mask and floral motifs. Atop the pediment stands a stone statue of a woman carrying a vessel on her head, a traditional representation of a local 'Jagoza'. The building has black wrought iron balconies and windows with distinctive white frames. A sign for 'PEPE VERDE PIZZERIA' is visible on the ground floor. In the foreground, a yellow DHL delivery truck and numerous overhead power lines are visible against a clear blue sky.

details.description: Street-level view of an ornate historic Portuguese townhouse/façade. The white, stuccoed front is richly decorated with neo‑baroque/rococo reliefs (scrolls, wreaths, shells) and blue-painted accents on pilasters and cornice. A triangular pediment crowns the center; it has acroteria/pine‑cone finials and a rooftop statue at the apex: a slender female allegorical figure lifting a wreath or circular object above her head. The upper floor features a continuous wrought‑iron balcony with three tall, rectangular windows having decorative geometric glazing/fanlights. Ground-floor doorways have arched fanlights. Overhead street cables and nearby shop/bank signs indicate a narrow historic center street in Portugal, under clear daylight.

details.description: Street-level view along a narrow urban street toward an ornate historic facade with a triangular pediment. A slender female statue crowns the pediment, while pinecone-like finials mark the corners. The whitewashed facade features rich stucco ornament (wreaths, swags, cartouches), blue accent bands, arched and rectangular windows with decorative leaded glass, and wrought‑iron balconies. Shopfronts occupy the ground floor and a yellow delivery van is partly visible. Numerous overhead utility cables cross the scene against a clear blue sky.

details.description: A low-angle, architectural photograph (rotated 90 degrees clockwise) capturing the ornate upper facade of a historical building against a clear blue sky. The building, identified as the Ideal Clube, features a Neoclassical or Eclectic style typical of the Amazon Rubber Boom era, characterized by a white facade with deep blue pilasters and trim. A prominent triangular pediment sits at the top, decorated with intricate relief carvings including scrolling foliage and a central mascaron (face). At the apex of the pediment stands a statue of a female figure with one arm raised. Below the roofline, there are tall windows with dark shutters and iron balconies. A chaotic web of black power lines crisscrosses the foreground, obscuring parts of the view. To the right (bottom in the rotated orientation), a vertical sign reads "PEPE VERDE" with "PIZZERIA" below it, and another green sign partially visible reads "CAMIN...". A portion of a yellow vehicle with a red logo, likely a DHL van, is visible at the edge.

details.description: A photograph of a historic building with neoclassical features, oriented horizontally. The building, known as the Solar dos Neves, is primarily white with blue trim. It features a large triangular pediment with a central relief of a face and a statue of a woman standing at the apex. The facade is decorated with ornate plasterwork around the windows and a long balcony with a black wrought-iron railing. A sign for 'Pepe Verde Pizzaria' is attached to the building. Numerous overhead power lines are visible against the clear blue sky. A yellow DHL truck is partially visible in the lower right corner.
